# APC Module 1 Part 1 — Reference

## Overview

Ambulatory patient care covers outpatient clinical services.

## Team Composition

Physician, advanced practice clinician (PA or NP), RN, medical assistant, and administrative staff form the core APC team.

## Quality Metrics

Three tracked across APC visits:

- PROMs
- Clinical process adherence
- Follow-up closure

## Triage Heuristic

Four dimensions: Acuity, Chronicity, Complexity, Competence of setting.
